focused_beam_size.title: Focused Beam Size (µm)
focused_beam_size.description: The vertical extent of the primary beam at the sample position. 200 µm at the sample position means we focus on the detector for maximum reciprocal space resolution.

time_per_pdf.title: Time per PDF (seconds)
time_per_pdf.description: Total exposure time for each diffraction pattern/PDF in seconds.

q_max.title: Q-max (Å⁻¹)
q_max.description: The required maximum momentum transfer for this collection.

frames.title: Frames
frames.description: The number of PDFs [at each temperature]. The total time for this experiment will be (time per PDF) × (frames) × (number of temperatures).

list_of_temperatures.title: List of Cobra Temperatures (K)
list_of_temperatures.description: The required temperatures in Kelvin. Individual data points will be collected at these temperatures after a short thermal stabilisation time.

ramp_rate.title: Cobra Ramp Rate (K/min)
ramp_rate.description: The required ramp rate for the cobra in K/min.

settle_time.title: Settle time per temperature point (seconds)
settle_time.description: The required settle time per temperature point in seconds.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Add a comment to this experiment definition, to provide additional information or context. The comment will have no impact on the experiment definition itself, and is purely for informational purposes.
